title: Centre Administrator cum Teacher Assistant (Student Care) | 6 days | Tiong Bahru - YZ11
description:
Centre Administrator cum Teacher Assistant 

  • Monday-Friday 1pm-8pm, Saturday 9am-6pm
  • Address: Tiong Bahru [302 Tiong Bahru Rd, #06-04, Singapore 168732 (Tiong Bahru Plaza)]
  • Salary: $2000 - $2500  

Job Overview:
Centre Administrator cum Teacher Assistant is responsible for the overall management of the centre, including administrative tasks, student support, and the coordination of tuition activities. This role ensures the centre operates smoothly, delivers high-quality educational support, and maintains a positive and productive environment for students and staff.

Job Description:

  1. Administrative Management: Oversee daily operations and ensure smooth running of the centre. Manage and update student records, attendance, and performance tracking. Handle general administrative tasks, including scheduling, correspondence, and documentation.

  2. Student Support: Act as the primary point of contact for students and parents. Address and resolve student and parent inquiries, concerns, and feedback. Provide guidance and support to students regarding their academic and personal needs. Assist with school fetchings.

  3. Tuition Coordination: Organize and manage tuition classes, including scheduling and room assignments. Coordinate with tutors to ensure they have the necessary resources and support. Assist in the development and implementation of curriculum and teaching materials.

  4. Financial Administration: Assist with billing and invoicing for student care and tuition fees and other centre services. Manage petty cash and monitor financial transactions related to centre activities.

Requirements: 

  • With Tuition/Enrichment/Preschool Admin experiences preferred. 


Tan Yen Zhen (Chen Yan Zhen) Reg No: R25138932

The SupremeHR Advisory Pte Ltd EA No: 14C7279
